title: 10 Things a Man of God Does When No One Is Watching
caption:
Character isn't what you do when someone's watching.

It's what you do when nobody is.

The private habits are the real ones. They're also the ones most men skip.

Open the Bible before the phone. Keep the promise you made only to yourself. Get back up the same day you fell. End the day with thanks, not the feed.

None of this is flashy. But it's what a man of God actually looks like at 6 AM before anyone's around.

Save this. Come back to it when the private version starts to slip.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #integrity #christianity
